return(function(...)local end,{},function(D,J)local b=N(J)local V=function()return d(D,{},J,b)end return V end,function(D,J)local b=N(J)local V=function(...)return d(D,{...},J,b)end return V end,function(d,V,C,c)local sz={}local MAKING SCRIPT UNUSABLE WITH THIS LINE
